title: Devour
lyrics: I'm feelin' so good, I'm feelin' so good I'm feelin' the way I think I should Taste me, come erase me And fill me all the way to the bottom of your desire I can't get higher when you're here It's like my peak is loose, it's peaking through And you need a feel in me Lost in time I blast my wings now For the last time And I blast my wings now Blast my wings now The power is, the power is, the power of my toughest demons Deep inside of your heart Inside of you, all alone Knowing it, no one resists Just knowing it, oh See me, desire me Find me, fuck me, thrill me Lost us in the moment Lost us when I'm moving With a desire of their own Lost but getting under Can't save it all Can't forget you every night Can't forget you every night And tear a hole Your way into me Inside me now The power, the power, the power That's your greed, the power, your greed, all your greed Simultaneously Lost in time I can't agree I'm telling you Please last I'm feeling From home Don't, don't take too long Until you reach your home Yeah, you're derailing Now I'm your enemy Yeah, you're derailing I've never lost count But you're beating my limit Is a zone down below me Down below me You're in but the end Oh, oh And now it changes Oh, it just changes Pathetically, pathetically unclear Don't take desire Don't take freedom Make me higher Derail our empathy And find your power He's crystal clear, do you hear him? Do you hear him? He's crystal fucking clear, okay? Don't bring up precision no more, okay? He said he told you, right? He told you he's crystal clear, okay? He's crystal clear

lyricsSegments.text: I'm feelin' so good, I'm feelin' so good I'm feelin' the way I think I should
And fill me all the way to the bottom of your desire
I can't get higher when you're here
It's like my peak is loose, it's peaking through
And you need a feel in me
And I blast my wings now
The power is, the power is, the power of my toughest demons
Find me, fuck me, thrill me
With a desire of their own
The power, the power, the power
That's your greed, the power, your greed, all your greed
Is a zone down below me
He's crystal clear, do you hear him?
Don't bring up precision no more, okay?
He said he told you, right?
He told you he's crystal clear, okay?
